name: Symptoms showed up days after strain at work in South Salt Lake, still covered?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, with medical proof linking delay to work.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if linked to work incident; delayed symptoms common but need medical proof of causation.[2] Report anyway immediately.[1] Key factors: (1) Doctor connects delay to event; (2) No witnesses? Use logs; (3) Consistent reporting; (4) Avoid adjuster traps.[2] Seek eval promptly, document timeline. Coverage possible with evidence.
